response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with deep, varied engineering experience (15+ years) and genuine developer-tooling credentials (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD infrastructure, MCP code generators). However, this is a people-management role requiring 2+ years of formal people management and 3+ years of technical leadership, and the resume shows no evidence of managing engineers, running one-on-ones, owning performance reviews, or leading organizational change. Mobile experience is limited to a brief iOS/Apple TV stint a decade ago, and there is no demonstrated roadmap or team-strategy ownership.
strengths: Extensive hands-on developer-tools experience: test frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD setup, GitLab/DevOps infrastructure, MCP code generators
15+ years of broad software development across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Strong engineering-culture contributions: workshops, Selenium courses, refactoring dojos, TDD/craftsmanship advocacy
concerns: No formal people-management experience — no evidence of direct reports, performance management, or team leadership
No demonstrated strategic roadmap ownership or organizational-change leadership
Mobile-platform experience is shallow and dated (one iOS/Apple TV project in 2015-2016)

key_factors.factor: Developer tools and testing infrastructure depth
